meta.description: Small event management and creative production agency. Organises corporate events, brand activations, and private celebrations. Also provides photography and video content. Team of 4 with a network of 10 freelance collaborators.

profile.technical_capability: Low — comfortable with Google tools only
previous_ai_attempts: None formally — team uses ChatGPT occasionally for drafting
profile.client_growth_rate: ~10% per quarter in number of active clients

data_availability.notes: All client and project data in Google Sheets. No structured CRM. Invoicing via email with PDF invoices. No ticket or case tracking.
data_availability.data_quality_overall: VERY LOW — no structured data. Financial summary available manually.

processes.name: Client Acquisition and Proposal
steps: Inquiry arrives via WhatsApp, email, or referral
Custom proposal written from scratch in Google Docs
Negotiation and contract signing (PDF contract via email)
50% deposit invoice sent before work begins

bottlenecks.description: Every proposal written from scratch — no templates, no reuse of previous proposals
bottlenecks.time_impact: 3–5 hours per proposal, 3–6 proposals per month

bottlenecks.description: Contract sent as static PDF — no e-signature, requires printing and scanning from some clients
bottlenecks.time_impact: Adds 1–3 days to contract signing cycle

manual_tasks_wanting_automation: Follow-up email sequencing after proposal sent

processes.name: Event Execution Coordination
steps: Create project plan in Google Sheets per event
Brief and coordinate freelancers via WhatsApp groups
Track tasks, deadlines, and deliverables manually
Collect assets from freelancers (photos, videos, documents)

bottlenecks.description: Post-event reports written manually from photos, notes, and attendance data — no template
bottlenecks.time_impact: 4–6 hours per report, one report per event

bottlenecks.description: Freelancer coordination via WhatsApp — no task tracking, information lives in chat history
bottlenecks.time_impact: Significant time lost to follow-ups, missed updates, repeated questions
